name: ABM INDUSTRIES INC /DE/
summary: PART I . General ABM Industries Incorporated, which operates through its subsidiaries (collectively referred to as ABM, we, us, our, or the Company), is a leading provider of facility maintenance, engineering and infrastructure solutions with a mission to make a difference, every person, every day . Our history dates back to 1909, when American Building Maintenance Company began as a window washing company in San Francisco with one employee.
